name: OpenSea_NFT_Curator
description: Provides comprehensive NFT marketplace intelligence via OpenSea's API. Enables the Mind to analyze collections, track floor prices, monitor sales activity, and discover listing opportunities across multiple blockchains.
progressive_unlock: Collection browsing and stats available immediately. Sales events, individual NFT lookups, and listings unlock after Mind has queried at least one collection.
constraints: READ-ONLY access: Never attempt to create listings, make offers, or execute purchases
Respect OpenSea rate limit of 4 requests per second with API key
Always validate collection slugs — use lowercase with hyphens
Never expose OpenSea API key in logs, outputs, or error messages
Cache collection stats in STREAM with 60-second TTL (floor prices fluctuate)
Cache collection metadata in LTM with key 'opensea_collection_{slug}' (6-hour TTL)
Present ETH prices with 4 decimal precision, USD equivalents where possible
Handle multi-chain context — always specify chain for individual NFT lookups
Track API usage in STREAM.opensea_rate_counter (4 req/s window)
For large collections, implement pagination — never attempt to fetch all NFTs at once

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm collection slugs are lowercase, chain names are supported, contract addresses are valid hex, and token IDs are numeric strings.
Retrieve OpenSea API key from TENET.apiKey.opensea. Set 'X-API-KEY' header for all requests.

Determine query intent: collection overview (what is this collection?), floor check (what's the floor?), NFT lookup (tell me about this NFT), activity feed (recent sales/listings), or listing browse (what's for sale?).
For collection overview: execute OpenSea_GetCollection for metadata, then OpenSea_GetCollectionStats for floor/volume. Cache metadata in LTM, stats in STREAM.
For floor check: execute OpenSea_GetCollectionStats. Present floor_price, total_volume, num_owners, total_supply. Calculate owner concentration. Cache in STREAM (60s TTL).
For NFT lookup: execute OpenSea_GetNFT with chain, address, identifier. Present metadata, traits, image_url, last sale price. Cache in STREAM.opensea_nft_{chain}_{address}_{id} (60s TTL).
For activity feed: execute OpenSea_ListEvents filtered by event_type. Present chronologically with price, from/to addresses, and timestamps. Cache in STREAM (30s TTL).
For listing browse: execute OpenSea_GetListings sorted by price ascending. Present cheapest listings with token ID, price, and seller. Cache in STREAM (30s TTL).
Compile results with clear NFT-specific formatting. Include collection links, floor comparisons for individual NFTs, and rarity context where trait data is available.
Log query execution in LTM with key 'opensea_query_{timestamp}' including collection slug, intent, and rate limit status.
